title: picea likiangensis subsp. rubescens
intro: Picea likiangensis subsp. rubescens, also known as a subspecies of the Likiang spruce, is a type of evergreen coniferous tree native to the mountainous regions of China. The bark and needles of this plant have been used in traditional Chinese medicine for their medicinal properties, including antiseptic and anti-inflammatory effects, which help to soothe and calm the body. The health benefits of Picea likiangensis subsp. rubescens include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce stress and anxiety, and improve respiratory health. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions, as well as being incorporated into various formulas and blends to promote overall well-being and vitality.
